center.name: 阿奈馬萊丘陵
center.summary: 阿奈馬萊丘陵是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Palani laughingthrush、Nilgiri flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is found in the higher hills (mostly above 1200 m) of the Nilgiris, Palni Hills, Anaimalai Hills, the Brahmagiri, Bababudan Hills, and Biligiriranga Hills.{{cite book|url= https://archive.org/stream/birdsofindiabein01jerd#page/463/mode/1up|pages=464–465|author=Jerdon TC|title=The Birds of India

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is restricted south of the Palghat Gap with the main distribution range in the higher regions (above ) of the Palani Hills extending into the Annamalai Hills in western Tamil Nadu and Munnar in Kerala
